---
title: "Talks"
listing:
  contents: "talks/*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, subtitle, description, categories]
  feed: false
page-layout: full
---

Presentations and slides from conferences, seminars, and workshops.

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## How to add a talk

1. Copy `talks/_template/` to `talks/YYYY-talk-name/`.
2. Edit `index.qmd`. Remove `draft: true` from the front-matter when ready to publish.
3. Run `quarto render` from the project root — the listing above will pick it up automatically.
:::
